rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK et al

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MANGAN VS. KEY MORTGAGE CORP DBA KMC MORTGAGE CORP
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTS GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC, ETS SERVICES, LLC's DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. MERS's Demurrer to Third Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MANGAN VS. KEY MORTGAGE CORP DBA KMC MORTGAGE CORP
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT MORTGAGEIT, INC.'s DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. MortgageIt's Demurrer to Third Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to 5th cause of action and OVERRULED as to 4th cause of action. = (EC/501)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment To Quash Writ And For Leave To File Answer
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 10. DEFENDANT LEILANI RANDOLPH's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment To Quash Writ And For Leave To File Answer. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. rulings.Case Title: RALAN WONG VS. TIFFANY BARBER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Ntc Of Mtn For A Stay Of Proceedings/Alt For An Order Finding That The Instant Action Is Not One For Declaratory Relief; Etc
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 12. DEFENDANTs TIFFANY BARBER, SARAH SHARAF and MATT PINNA's Amended Motion For A Stay Of Proceedings/Alternatively For An Order Finding That The Instant Action Is Not One For Declaratory Relief. Defendant's Motion for Stay of Proceedings is DENIED as to requests a, b and d. Parties are ordered to appear at 9 a.m. and engage in further meet and confer efforts as to additional discovery. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES A. HENNEFER VS. MARGARET A. SELTZER, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SELTZER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Inspection Demand, And For Monetary, Issue, Evidence And Terminating Sanctions; Memo Of P&A; Declaration Of Michael C. Chen
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 9. DEFENDANT MARGARET SELTZER's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Inspection Demand, And For Monetary, Issue, Evidence And Terminating Sanctions. Defendant's Motion to Compel is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve further responses to (1) Form Interrogatory 50.1 and (2) Request for Product of Documents no later than August 5, 2012 4pm. Request for Sanctions is DENIED. Defendant does not cite any legal authority for her proposition that pro per litigants are entitled to attorney's fees. Declaration of Michael Chen re: costs is hearsay. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: VICTORIA ASSOCIATES VS. CYNDI LEHMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT CYNDI LEHMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike is OFF CALENDAR. First Amended Complaint filed 7/2/12 and Answer filed on 7/9/12. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. LONNIE MCDONALD et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 13. DEFENDANT LONNIE MCDONALD's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND for Plaintiff to allege facts of Defendant's forcible entry and to clarify whether Defendant was a licensee "at all relevant times" or only prior to May 8, 2012. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: LAUREL GARDEN APARTMENTS VS. ESTHER C NNADI
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT ESTHER NNADI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Notice is fatally defective re: disclaimer of disabled individuals' rights. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: THE PINNACLE AT NOB HILL VS. THOMAS WANDLASS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANTS THOMAS WANDLASS and NANCY WANDLASS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. First Amended Complaint and Notice of Bankruptcy filed 7/25/12. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC VS. KIMBERLY SWAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery; To Continue Settlement Conference And Trial; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf Mcormack Baron Ragan Management Services And Its Attorneys Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY SWAN's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery; To Continue Settlement Conference And Trial; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Mcormack Baron Ragan Management Services And Its Attorneys Of Record. Defendant's Motion to Compel is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall personally serve responses to (1) Request for Production by August 6, 2012 4pm; and (2) produce PMK for deposition August 2-8, 2012. Trial date is continued to August 13, 2012 and Settlement Conference is continued to August 9, 2012. Defendant's request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $1,000. = (EC/501)

Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 1, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT ERIKA OHLSSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND for Plaintiff to allege in good faith compliance with SFRO 37.9(a)(2) and allege facts showing that Defendant causes a nuisance. = (EC/501)
